deceasedcraft.difficulty.easy:
§aEasy Difficulty§r
§a50%%§r reduced global enemy spawns.
§a50%%§r less enemy health and damage.
§a25%%§r more loot in all containers.
deceasedcraft.difficulty.normal:
§fNormal Difficulty§r
No modifiers.
The §fstandard§r difficulty for this modpack.
deceasedcraft.difficulty.hard:
§cHard Difficulty§r
Rebalanced, §charder§r enemies in all districts.
Loot in containers reduced by §c25%%§r.
Death will §creduce§r your max health from unique foods, requiring you to eat them again.
More §cfrequent§r, §cbuffed§r and §clonger§r horde waves.
Contraptionquest.tech.create.contraption: Contraption mechanisms allow players to make structures that can interract with the world.
&cNote&r: Only vanilla Minecraft and Create Containers allow storing items in a contraption.
Max amount of blocks that can be in a Contraiption is &b384.&r
Defense.05E8EE4AA49C4A8C.desc_1: Blockages makes Intruders slow down and take damage from the Blockage.
Defense.092D29FDBEDBBC36.desc_1: &bMine&r will explode whenever an entity triggers it by stepping on the Mine the Player/Team that owns the mine will not trigger it to explode.
Defense.092D29FDBEDBBC36.desc_2: The Mine can be hidden inside various blocks players can see the compatible blocks via checking the recipe from JEI.
Defense.0F26C84469851CBD.desc_1: Uninsulated wires from Immersive Engineering deals damage that ignores armor that scales with the wire type and the amount of FE running through the wire system.
Defense.0F26C84469851CBD.desc_2: Wires can pass through the Fences with the exceptation of Razor Wire which can have LV wires connected to make it electrified.
Defense.1015AE88F9161516.desc_1: &bCross-border Pursuit Permit&r allows players to Whitelist/Blacklist Mobs and players.
Defense.1015AE88F9161516.desc_2: Make sure to view the Cross-border Pursuit Permit information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
Defense.1015AE88F9161516.subtitle: and you best hope...
Defense.14E6EB70192EE30F.desc_1: &bSentry Mechanical Arms&r can hold any &bTimeless and Classics Zero&r Gun and use them with no reloading restrictions.
Defense.14E6EB70192EE30F.desc_2: Because Sentry Arms bypass reloading it is very easy for them to waste ammunition it is advised players automate ammunition before starting to use Sentry Arms
Defense.14E6EB70192EE30F.desc_3: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Sentry Mechanical Arm for more assembly and usage instructions!
Defense.14E6EB70192EE30F.subtitle: Designed by me built by me
Defense.1B09341A8CFFD539.desc_1: Fake Water deals damage to any mob/player that touches it.
Defense.1B09341A8CFFD539.subtitle: Watermania?
Defense.1C37DFF49FC76F81.desc_1: &bBlaze Fire Control&r is used for connecting the listed Mobs/Players from &bCross-border Pursuit Permit to Sentry Arm&r.
Defense.1C37DFF49FC76F81.desc_2: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Blaze Fire Control for more assembly and usage instructions!
Defense.1C37DFF49FC76F81.subtitle: not pointed at you
Defense.21DB6A930CC60D36.desc_1: Lava can be generated for placing inside the moat via:
Defense.21DB6A930CC60D36.desc_2: - Putting down a Quark &bIron Grate&r on top of a lava source allows &bMechanical Pump&r to source infinite lava from the single source of lava.
Defense.21DB6A930CC60D36.desc_3: - Using a &bHose Pulley&r on a lava pool that covers &610.000&r space worth of blocks &8(The lava that covers 10.000 block of space doesnt necessarily have to be all source blocks.)&r
Defense.21DB6A930CC60D36.desc_4: - Using &bDripstone and Cauldron&r to generate lava and pumping the generated lava inside the Cauldron via &bMechanical Pump&r. &8(It tooks approximately 20 Minutes for lava to be generated inside a single cauldron.)&r
Defense.21DB6A930CC60D36.subtitle: Pyromania!
Defense.2A2639B33B602103.desc_1: &bClaymore&r will explode whenever an entity triggers it by stepping near its trigger point &6(indicated by white lines coming out from the claymore)&r the Player/Team that owns the Claymore will not trigger it to explode.
Defense.2E549CE27A81E6E5.desc_1: &bCannons&r allows players to shoot Cannon Shells which depending on the type can do different kinds of damage.
Defense.2E549CE27A81E6E5.desc_2: More about building and using a Cannon can be found in Cannon guide section.
Defense.2E549CE27A81E6E5.subtitle: FIRE IN THE HOLE
Defense.33B54DA2F5C8E374.desc_1: &bLand Mine&r will explode whenever an entity triggers it by stepping on the Land Mine including the player who have placed the mine.
Defense.341D54F321EFB4B3.desc_1: Razor Wire is an expensive variant of the fences it deals higher dps constantly.
Defense.341D54F321EFB4B3.desc_2: It can only be removed by using the Wire cutter tool.
Defense.3991382B4A084CFE.desc_1: Liquid Redstone Acid on world will give mobs and players Conductive 2 effect when touched which makes wires from Immersive Engineering deal more damage.
Defense.3991382B4A084CFE.subtitle: MORE ZAP!!
Defense.3B4AE4BDDE294F02.desc_1: &bBouncing Betty&r jumps high in the sky and explodes in the mid air whenever an entity triggers it by stepping on the Bouncing Betty the Player/Team that owns the Bouncing Betty will not trigger it to explode.
Defense.3C857D235F7092BB.desc_1: Players should fortify their base with blocks that can not be broken easily/can not be broken in order for blocking Hordes breaking inside the base and destroying the interior.
Defense.3F12F5F230E16B11.desc_1: Explosives gives players a way to do Area Damage via explosion to intruders.
Defense.3F12F5F230E16B11.subtitle: Kaboom?
Defense.432E80A59A2556A2.desc_1: With Hordes coming up every &615&r days players who have decided to base up must build defenses in order for protecting their bases from Block Destroying Zombie variants.
Defense.432E80A59A2556A2.desc_2: Fortunately this guide section will be showing off the various ways to defend your base from Hordes.
Defense.5A95FDC6F3F6C798.desc_1: Barbed Fence will inflict bleeding effect on mobs that touches it.
Defense.5A95FDC6F3F6C798.desc_2: This Fence varient can be only collected from wasteland.
Defense.5F4F7A486F2EF53F.desc_1: Barbed Wire is the cheapest Fence variant it wont deal damage if the mob touching the wire is not moving.
Defense.624DFE3334EAFF22.desc_1: &bObsidian&r is the easiest block to get for defending your base from first few Hordes but keep in mind that in later hordes obsidian will not be able to keep up with the later horde zombies so players must use some thing special...
Defense.624DFE3334EAFF22.subtitle: Fan favorite
Defense.6491E015DD676FB3.desc_1: Turret type of defense allows players to get rid of larger amounts of zombies quicker at the cost of resources.
Defense.6491E015DD676FB3.subtitle: Answer use a gun and if that don't work use more gun
Defense.66FEE897541257AF.desc_1: &bTesla Coil&r From Create damages enemies with in a 3 blocks of radius and stuns them.
Defense.6A5E031B38126690.desc_1: &bBlock Reinforcer&r allows players to make &bindestructible&r blocks these special blocks can only be removed by the Player/Team that owns the Reinforced Block.
Defense.6A5E031B38126690.desc_2: Reinforceable block can be viewed from JEI through by looking at the recipes for Block Reinforcer.
Defense.6A5E031B38126690.subtitle: Unbreaking how much?
Defense.765E0D821FDCE37B.desc_1: &bTesla Coil&r From Immersive Engineering damages single target with in a 5 block of radius.
Defense.7771113E9C05A11E.desc_1: Making a Moat for letting Horde Zombies to fall in allows players to passively kill the horde waves with lesser resource consumption.
Defense.7771113E9C05A11E.subtitle: Be careful!
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.desc_1: Restricts access of a drawer to only the locking player.
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.desc_2: &cWARNING: DOES NOT MAKE THE DRAWER UNBREAKABLE.&r
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.subtitle: My precious...
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.title: Personal Key
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.desc_1: Restricts access of a drawer to the locking player, as well as their team.
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.desc_2: &cWARNING: DOES NOT MAKE THE DRAWER UNBREAKBLE.&r
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.title: Team Key
